# growthbook_metric (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook (legacy) metric by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique metric identifier (e.g. `met_...`).

### Read-Only

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the metric is archived.
- `behavior` (Attributes) Analysis behavior settings for the metric. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--behavior))
- `datasource_id` (String) Data source ID.
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `description` (String) Metric description.
- `managed_by` (String) Where the metric is managed from.
- `name` (String) Metric name.
- `owner` (String) Metric owner.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs that can access this metric.
- `sql` (Attributes) SQL definition of the metric. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sql))
- `tags` (List of String) Tags applied to the metric.
- `type` (String) Metric type.

<a id="nestedatt--behavior"></a>
### Nested Schema for `behavior`

Read-Only:

- `capping_settings` (Attributes) Outlier capping settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--behavior--capping_settings))
- `goal` (String) Metric goal direction.
- `max_percent_change` (Number) Maximum significant percent change.
- `min_percent_change` (Number) Minimum significant percent change.
- `min_sample_size` (Number) Minimum sample size.
- `prior_settings` (Attributes) Bayesian prior settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--behavior--prior_settings))
- `risk_threshold_danger` (Number) Deprecated risk danger threshold.
- `risk_threshold_success` (Number) Deprecated risk success threshold.
- `target_mde` (Number) Target minimum detectable effect.
- `window_settings` (Attributes) Conversion window settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--behavior--window_settings))

<a id="nestedatt--behavior--capping_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `behavior.capping_settings`

Read-Only:

- `ignore_zeros` (Boolean) Ignore zeros for percentile capping.
- `type` (String) Capping type.
- `value` (Number) Cap value or percentile.


<a id="nestedatt--behavior--prior_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `behavior.prior_settings`

Read-Only:

- `mean` (Number) Prior mean.
- `override` (Boolean) Override org defaults.
- `proper` (Boolean) Use a proper prior.
- `stddev` (Number) Prior standard deviation.


<a id="nestedatt--behavior--window_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `behavior.window_settings`

Read-Only:

- `delay_unit` (String) Delay unit.
- `delay_value` (Number) Conversion delay.
- `type` (String) Window type.
- `window_unit` (String) Window unit.
- `window_value` (Number) Window length.



<a id="nestedatt--sql"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sql`

Read-Only:

- `conversion_sql` (String) Conversion SQL query.
- `denominator_metric_id` (String) Denominator metric ID.
- `identifier_types` (List of String) Identifier types this metric supports.
- `user_aggregation_sql` (String) User aggregation SQL.
